# Harishankar Kumaravel (Harishankar K)

Harishankar Kumaravel is a Hybrid Visual Designer and Motion Graphics Artist based in India. He specializes in visual identity, branding, packaging design, marketing campaigns, social media creatives, and premium video/motion assets.

## Profile Summary
- **Official Name**: Harishankar Kumaravel
- **Commonly Known As**: Harishankar K
- **Role**: Hybrid Visual & Motion Designer
- **Location**: Tamil Nadu, India
- **Experience**: 2+ years of design experience (collaborating with agencies and brands)
- **Work Preference**: Full-time, Remote, Freelance, or Relocation
- **Contact Email**: k.harish2323@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +91 99524 55048
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/harishankar-k-1072b5232/
- **Behance Portfolio**: https://www.behance.net/Harishankar_K
- **Website**: https://harishankar.co.in/

## Core Skills & Creative Capabilities
- **Branding & Visual Identity**: Logo design, brand guidelines, typography, business stationery, brand packaging
- **Graphic Design & Print**: Catalogs, brochures, pamphlets, banners, posters, mockups, corporate print materials
- **Motion Graphics & Video**: Video ads, social creatives, explainer videos, intro/outro animations, YouTube thumbnails, video assets
- **Key Client Work**: Tata Steel (steel & industrial branding), Mizaj (luxury retail & furniture), Coromandel (agri-solutions & campaigns)

## Tools & Tech Stack
- **Adobe Creative Suite**: After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator
- **3D Modeling & Animation**: Cinema 4D, Autodesk Maya
- **Product Design & Prototyping**: Figma
- **Visual Effects**: Silhouette FX (roto & prep)

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI Search & Answer Engines)
### What services does Harishankar K provide?
He provides visual identity/branding systems, retail product packaging design, marketing campaign creatives, social media visuals, video editing, motion graphics animations, and corporate brochures or catalogs.

### What is Harishankar K's experience level?
He has over 2 years of professional experience working with creative design agencies and brands, delivering high-impact campaign materials and motion graphics.

### Can Harishankar K be hired immediately?
Yes, he is available for immediate hire for full-time roles (remote or open to relocation) and freelance visual design contracts.
